data.title: Medistim ASA Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting and 2024 Report Release
data.description:
Medistim ASA ( (DE:MD1) ) has shared an announcement.

Medistim ASA has announced its Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 8, 2025, at its Oslo headquarters. The meeting will address various company matters, allowing shareholders to vote via proxy if unable to attend. The announcement includes the release of the 2024 annual report, emphasizing Medistim’s ongoing commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement.

More about Medistim ASA

Medistim ASA, headquartered in Norway, is a niche leader in ultrasound technology, focusing on medical equipment for cardiac, vascular, and transplant surgeries. Established in 1984, the company has shown consistent profitable growth and continues to invest in new product development. Medistim operates through wholly owned subsidiaries in several countries and has a network of about 60 distributors worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: 7.94%

Average Trading Volume: 223

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €250.6M

data.title: TBS Holdings Announces Tender Offer for WACUL Shares
data.description:
TBS HOLDINGS INC. ( (JP:9401) ) has shared an update.

TBS Holdings, Inc. has announced a tender offer to acquire shares of WACUL, Inc., a company listed on the Growth Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition aims to potentially delist WACUL from the exchange, with TBS Holdings planning to make WACUL a wholly-owned subsidiary through a series of procedures. This strategic move could impact WACUL’s market presence and shareholder dynamics, as TBS Holdings strengthens its position in the industry.

More about TBS HOLDINGS INC.

TBS Holdings, Inc. operates in the media and entertainment industry, primarily focusing on broadcasting and content production. It is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its diverse media offerings.

data.title: Dalata Hotel Group Sees Change in Major Holdings
data.description:
Dalata Hotel ( (GB:DAL) ) has shared an update.

Dalata Hotel Group PLC has announced a change in its major holdings, with The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. reducing its voting rights in the company to below 5%. This adjustment in holdings reflects a decrease in Goldman Sachs’ influence over Dalata Hotel Group, potentially impacting the company’s shareholder dynamics and market perception.

More about Dalata Hotel

Dalata Hotel Group PLC operates within the hospitality industry, primarily focusing on hotel management and operations. The company is known for its portfolio of hotels, catering to both business and leisure travelers, and is a significant player in the Irish and UK hotel markets.

data.title: Yancoal Australia Ltd to Release 1Q 2025 Report and Host Webcast
data.description:
The latest update is out from Yancoal Australia Ltd. ( (AU:YAL) ).

Yancoal Australia Ltd has announced that it will release its first-quarter 2025 Quarterly Report on April 17, 2025, after 6:30 pm AEST. The company will also host a webcast for investors and analysts on April 28, 2025, to discuss the report. This announcement is part of Yancoal’s regular communication with stakeholders, providing insights into its financial performance and operational updates.

More about Yancoal Australia Ltd.

Yancoal Australia Ltd is a company incorporated in Victoria, Australia, with limited liability. It is listed on both the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and the Australian Securities Exchange. The company is involved in the coal industry, focusing on the production and sale of coal.

data.title: Bellini Nautica Announces Shareholders’ Meeting for April 2025
data.description:
An update from Bellini Nautica S.P.A. ( (IT:BELL) ) is now available.

Bellini Nautica S.p.A. has announced the convening of its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 29, 2025. The meeting will address several key agenda items, including the approval of financial statements, allocation of operating results, and appointments to the Board of Directors and Board of Statutory Auditors. This meeting is significant for the company’s governance and strategic direction, impacting shareholders and stakeholders involved in its operations.

More about Bellini Nautica S.P.A.

Bellini Nautica S.p.A. operates in the luxury boating sector, specializing in the production and trading of boats under the Bellini Yacht brand. The company also focuses on the restoration and trading of ‘Vintage Riva’ boats and offers a wide range of related services.

data.title: Yoshinoya Holdings Announces Leadership Changes to Drive Growth
data.description:
The latest update is out from Yoshinoya Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9861) ).

Yoshinoya Holdings Co., Ltd. announced a significant leadership restructuring to enhance its adaptability in a rapidly changing business environment and to support its long-term growth strategy. The changes include appointing Tetsuya Naruse as the new Representative Director, President, and CEO, effective May 27, 2025, with the aim of strengthening the company’s strategic direction and corporate value.

More about Yoshinoya Holdings Co., Ltd.

Yoshinoya Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the food service industry, primarily known for its beef bowl dishes and other Japanese cuisine. The company focuses on expanding its market presence across Asia and enhancing its corporate value through strategic leadership changes.
